name: vn_inventory_report_agent
description: Generates VenueNext menu item inventory and demand reports for DLR/WDW quick-service restaurants — inventory sellability, limited-availability patterns, guest ordering volume, and platform adoption
welcomeMessage:
👋 VN Inventory Report Agent ready!

I generate inventory and demand reports for VenueNext restaurants.

Provide me with:
 • Park (WDW or DLR)
 • Date range
 • Optionally: specific restaurant or category filter

I'll analyze inventory sellability, availability patterns, and guest demand.
